title: Implementation and Evaluation of Machine Learning Techniques in Educational Data Mining
description_es: Este trabajo presenta la implementación y evaluación de técnicas modernas de aprendizaje automático aplicadas a minería de datos educativos.
abstract: Educational data mining requires specialized machine learning techniques to extract meaningful patterns from student data. This paper implements and evaluates multiple ML approaches for predicting student performance and identifying at-risk learners.

citations.apa: García-Gil, D., Triguero, I., & Luengo, J. (2024). Implementation and Evaluation of Machine Learning Techniques in Educational Data Mining. Universidad de Córdoba Workshop, Córdoba, Spain.
citations.mla: García-Gil, David, et al. "Implementation and Evaluation of Machine Learning Techniques in Educational Data Mining." Universidad de Córdoba Workshop, Córdoba, Spain, 2024.
